# Taxzone

> Taxzone is a financial compliance and advisory platform based in Navi Mumbai, India, providing GST filing, income tax planning, accounting, startup incorporation, import-export compliance, and business finance documentation services. Founded 2003, led by Satkut Shamim, serving SMEs and individuals across Navi Mumbai and Maharashtra.

## Services
- GST Registration & Filing: /services/gst
- Income Tax Planning & Filing: /services/income-tax
- Accounting & Bookkeeping: /services/accounting
- Startup Incorporation: /services/startup
- Import-Export Compliance: /services/export
- Business Finance & Loan Documentation: /services/finance

## Company
- About: /about
- Client Stories: /client-stories
- Contact: /contact
- Resources: /resources

## Blog / Knowledge Base
- GST Registration Guide for Startups in Maharashtra: /blog/gst-registration-guide-startups-maharashtra
